title: Basic JavaScript Arrays Basics
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Arrays Basics. Focus on implementing Array creation (literal, constructor, Array.from) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Arrays Basics
description: Create a function that uses Array creation (literal, constructor, Array.from) and Array indexing and length together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Arrays Basics Project
description: Build a small application that applies Array creation (literal, constructor, Array.from), Array indexing and length, Accessing and modifying elements in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Arrays Basics
description: The following code has bugs related to Array creation (literal, constructor, Array.from). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Arrays Basics
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Array creation (literal, constructor, Array.from) and Array indexing and length.
